description: Card bbox/crop fixture generated from stitched_1.png, stitched_2.png, stitched_3.png. These are practical reference crops for card detection evaluation, not pixel-perfect annotations.
coordinate_system: [x1, y1, x2, y2] in source image pixels; x2/y2 are exclusive.

annotation_policy.use_case: Evaluate whether automatic card bbox extraction crops the full card. Do not use this fixture as OCR ground truth.

items.notes: Practical card crop reference. Not pixel-perfect and not OCR ground truth.
